# init(version:item:keychain:pid:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new keychain callback information structure.

## Declaration

```swift
init(version: UInt32, item: Unmanaged<SecKeychainItem>, keychain: Unmanaged<SecKeychain>, pid: pid_t)
```
